verses.1: Where has your beloved gone, you fairest among women?
verses.2: My beloved has gone down to his garden,
verses.3: I am my beloved’s, and my beloved is mine.
verses.4: You are beautiful, my love, as Tirzah,
verses.5: Turn away your eyes from me,
verses.6: Your teeth are like a flock of ewes,
verses.7: Your temples are like a piece of a pomegranate behind your veil.
verses.8: There are sixty queens, eighty concubines,
verses.9: My dove, my perfect one, is unique.
verses.10: Who is she who looks out as the morning,
verses.11: I went down into the nut tree grove,
